title: Beach Photos & Vacation Memories
description: Family-friendly trivia about taking beach photos, vacation pictures, and creating memories

clues.question: What time of day is called the 'Golden Hour' for taking beautiful photos?
clues.answer: Early morning or late afternoon/early evening

clues.question: What feature on your camera or phone helps you frame a perfect beach shot using a grid?
clues.answer: Grid lines or rule of thirds
